chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1123 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.4657/2023 3. For hearing of main case 29-08-2023 Mr. Badruddin Memon, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Mr. Muneer Ahmed Siyal, Law Officer FIA Ali Ahmed Rajpar, DEO, (ES & HS) Khairpur.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- District Education Officer (Elementary, Secondary & Higher Secondary) Khairpur, present in person undertakes that within one week salary of the petitioner would be released and he would be paid the same. As far as issue of FIR registered against wife of petitioner by the FIA is concerned, the FIA may pursue the same in accordance with law. This petition is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
